title: palicourea brenesii
intro: Palicourea brenesii, also known as the Quebrada de San Nicolas, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and exhibiting antimalarial activity. Herbal preparations of Palicourea brenesii often involve the leaves and stems being dried and then made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
